text:
Created attachment 219844
cleanup pdf modules, add knobs for optional depencies


Q&A:
testport: OK (amd64;12.2)
portlint: OK (looks fine.)

This port is skipped becaused the pdflib dependency requires explicit acceptance of the license by the end-user. Since it's not used as far as I can tell I removed it (together with some other unused/unneeded php modules).
